sections.title: Before attempting to run past the Flame Statues

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: How am I supposed to get past this?

sections.title: When getting hit by the Flames
After making past the Flame Statues

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: Hopefully I'll make it out of Darkmeyer one day.

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: Phew, I made it! Time for a break.

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: Thank Saradomin that mysterious stranger gave me this ring or I'd be toast!

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: That trap was harder than I thought! Perhaps I'm not cut out for this.
